response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with extensive full-stack experience far exceeding the 6+ years requirement. He demonstrates proficiency in the core technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React), possesses strong architectural and performance optimization skills, and has direct experience with AI agent development. His commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and process improvement, along with a diverse background across various domains and technologies, makes him an excellent fit for this senior role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (12+ years) with a strong focus on quality and process improvement.
Proficiency in primary stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and deep understanding of architecture, scalability, and performance.
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and a strong track record of learning and applying diverse technologies.
concerns: Specific experience with Nest.js and Vitest is not explicitly mentioned in the resume.
Explicit experience with Kotlin and Python, as listed in required skills, is not detailed.
PostgreSQL experience is not explicitly mentioned, though other database experience is present.

key_factors.factor: Primary Stack Alignment & AI Agent Experience
